tierPage.title: Fee Approval Tiers
tierPage.subtitle: Configure the fee-amount tier matrix that determines which approver handles a fee change request.
tierPage.noTiers: No tiers configured. Add a tier to enable fee approval routing.

rulePage.title: Appointment Approval Rule
rulePage.subtitle: Configure which appointment reschedule conditions require approval.

ruleFields.weekendHolidayHint: Triggers approval when the new appointment falls on a non-business day.
ruleFields.weekdayHint: Triggers approval when the new appointment falls on a normal weekday (not a weekend or holiday). Off by default.
ruleFields.leadTimeHint: Triggers approval when the new appointment is sooner than the configured number of days away.
ruleFields.rescheduleHint: Triggers approval once the reschedule count meets or exceeds the threshold.

confirm.deleteTier: Delete tier "{{label}}"? This cannot be undone.
